name: Expion360 Inc.
summary: PARTI Our Company Expion360 focuses on the design, assembly, manufacturing, and sale of lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO4) batteries and supporting accessories for recreational vehicles (RVs), marine, and industrial applications. Our high-powered lithium battery solutions incorporate innovative concepts and have been designed to include some of the most dense and minimal-footprint batteries in the RV and marine industries.
